summary: First-finish testing of Phasor waitlist landing page. All 7 backend endpoints and all 17 frontend/UX checks passed. No console errors, no horizontal overflow at 1280 or 375.
passed: POST /api/waitlist same email idempotent -> same id returned
Landing page loads with hero headline 'Real-Time Synthetic Media Defense'
waitlist-form accepts email + shows Secured success state on valid submit
Invalid email submit does not permanently disable button
All 4 channel tabs (phone/zoom/chrome/email) switch and reveal corresponding mocks
All 3 demo cards (phone/zoom/chrome) render; play button click works
All 4 stat cards (latency, artifacts, fp, throughput) render
All 4 nav buttons (channels, demos, arch, cta) clickable
Zero console errors after filtering benign WebGL warnings
